title: HypurrCo AMAs: Neko - What are DeFAI swarms?
summary_title: AI agents automating HLP loops: Neko's DeFi infrastructure on Hyperliquid
summary_description: How Neko is building backend DeFi AI agents to solve capital efficiency, not just UX—plus 33% airdrop strategy and private beta launch.

key_moments.label: Neko introduced as DeFi AI storm for Hyperliquid and HyperEVM
Three reasons to build on Hyperliquid: community, egalitarian environment, execution
AI agents defined: bots with reasoning capacity, tools, and LLM APIs
DeFi AI agents unlock backend capital efficiency beyond UX improvements
Neko token bonded at 12M FDV in 20 minutes via HyperPump
100% fair launch float with 33% of supply airdropped to communities
Private beta launching second or third week of March, rate-limited to 100 users
V1 focuses on structured agentic workflows executing swaps and vault deposits automatically
